title: neolitsea kedahensis
intro: Neolitsea kedahensis is a plant species of the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia. It is known for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Neolitsea kedahensis is often used in teas, infusions, or extracts, which are believed to provide relief from various ailments.
